title: Nami Fights to Keep the Treasure
description: On pages 7–10, Nami’s obsession with treasure collides with Luffy’s blunt honesty and Buggy’s chaos.
scene: Nami tries to protect what she has stolen or earned, while the surrounding fight keeps pulling her deeper into the Straw Hats’ orbit.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I can't see why whether the North Pole or the South Pole is colder has to do with you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: If you want to know so badly, go to both places and check for yourself!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: A vessel is coming from the north west!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: A vessel's the same as a treasure box!! The most important thing to a pirate is his loot!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: It's not just one thing... it's everything!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: too nice for your own good. You and this ship's pirates...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: You don't know what a pirate really is!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: It was a map that had a huge amount of treasure lying on the sea-bed marked on it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Kuhahaha who wouldn't keep this to them- selves

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: My life's worries will end and HAPPI- mess will come!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Today we have another delightful victory!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: drink, drink to your heart's content, raise your voices and sing!!

summary: The part keeps Nami morally complicated: she is selfish, clever, and frightened, but also increasingly tied to Luffy and Zoro.
